name: Finch Mini Tool Demo
description: Finch mini tool demo — demonstrates all mini tool capabilities: forms, toasts, custom icons, tools, composer actions, and i18n.
systemPrompt: When the user wants to see mini tool demos, test forms, or understand Finch mini tool capabilities, use the Finch Mini Tool Demo.

try-all-fields.title: All Field Types
try-all-fields.prompt: Use the mini tool demo to show all form field types

try-login.title: Login Form
try-login.description: Demonstrate login form with secret fields
try-login.prompt: Use the mini tool demo to test the login form

try-toast.title: Toasts & Messages
try-toast.prompt: Use the mini tool demo to demonstrate toast and message capabilities

try-icons.title: Custom Icons
try-icons.description: View all registered mini tool icons
try-icons.prompt: Use the mini tool demo to show all registered custom icons

action.all-fields.prompt: Use the extension example to show all form field types
action.login.prompt: Use the extension example to test the login form
action.timeout.prompt: Use the extension example to test the 30-second timeout form
action.config.prompt: Use the extension example to test the project config form
action.toast.prompt: Use the extension example to demonstrate toast and message capabilities
action.preview.prompt: Use the extension example to show all registered custom icons
toast.toast.desc: 「{label}」test prompt — open toast demo tool for more
form.all-fields.title: All Field Types Test
form.all-fields.description: All field types supported by Finch requestForm, with side-by-side layout demo.
form.all-fields.name.label: Name
form.all-fields.age.label: Age
form.all-fields.password.label: Password
form.all-fields.color.label: Favorite Color
form.all-fields.bio.label: Bio
form.all-fields.subscribe.label: Subscribe to Notifications
form.all-fields.link.label: Visit Finch Website →
result.all-fields.success: ✅ Form submitted! Here's what you entered:
form.login.title: Login
form.login.description: Enter your login credentials. Password is marked as secret and won't be returned to the model.
form.login.username.label: Username
form.login.password.label: Password
form.login.password.description: This field value will not be exposed to the AI model
form.login.remember.label: Remember me
result.login.notice: > Note: The password field is marked as `secret: true` and its value was not returned to the model.
form.timeout.description.with: This form will auto-cancel in **{seconds} seconds**.
form.timeout.description.without: This form has no timeout limit and will wait indefinitely.
form.timeout.input.label: Type something
form.timeout.input.placeholder: Type anything… or wait for timeout
result.timeout.timeout: ⏰ Timed out! Form auto-cancelled after {seconds} seconds of inactivity.
form.config.title: Project Configuration
form.config.description: Configure basic parameters for a new project
form.config.name.label: Project Name
form.config.language.label: Primary Language
form.config.port.label: Port Number
form.config.initGit.label: Initialize Git
form.config.initReadme.label: Generate README
form.config.notes.label: Notes
result.config.footer: You can now use Finch tools to create this project.
toast.demo.title: {variant} Notification
